center.name: 巴拉巴克岛
center.summary: 巴拉巴克岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Palawan hornbill、Spot-throated flameback、Red-headed flameback等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: left|thumb|A Blue-headed Racket-tail seen in Coron The species is endemic to the islands of Palawan, Balabac Island, Dumaran Island, Linapacan, Culion, and Busuanga Island.It inhabits lowland forest and adjacent cultivated areas, and occasionally scrubland and mangroves, at altitudes of up to at least 650 m. The species is currently classified as Vulnerable by the IUCN, and has been since 1994

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to Balabac Island, Palawan and the Calamian Islands in the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is only found in Palawan and the nearby islands of Balabac, Busuanga, Calauit, Culion and Coron

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines only being found in the region of Palawan in the islands of Balabac, mainland Palawan, Busuanga and Calamian

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines only being found in the province of Palawan in the islands of Balabac, Busuanga and Calamian and mainland Palawan
